creator: schaiba@gmail.com
text: Setup is CURRENT/amd64 running as a Bhyve guest with 12-RELEASE as host. With the previous kernel (FreeBSD current 13.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #3 r361646: Sat May 30 21:37:35 EEST 2020), DHCP worked just fine, but after upgrading today, I get "ip length 576 disagrees with bytes received 574." messages and the VM gets no IP after a few failed attempts. The reason I believe it's the kernel is the fact that if I use the old kernel with the new userland, everything works. New kernel is FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #4 r362149: Sun Jun 14 02:51:50 EEST
